maps_to_prompt_verdict: (not A/B/C: smoke not run; not D: nothing failed; not E: bundle present) -- closest honest state: runtime parity-verified, live smoke gated on a bit-exact CABT->packed converter

parity.note: vendored runtime reproduces Model A bit-exactly when fed Model A pre-packed inputs

off_mode.reason: selector/runtime is NOT imported by starmie_heuristics.choose_action; default STARMIE_SELECTOR_MODE=off; gameplay byte-for-byte baseline

live_smoke: NOT RUN -- a ~90% conversion is a divergent feature pipeline, which the task prohibits. Will not feed the model wrong features to manufacture a smoke.
handoff_to_model_a: To unblock the live smoke bit-exactly, Model A should EITHER (a) ship a CABT->packed converter (its pack pipeline accepting a raw CABT observation) into the portable bundle, OR (b) document the exact SELECT_CARD/tutor source/target card resolution + context_card_id (effect.id) rules so Model B can match them. Then the validated conversion -> rank_and_select runs the tiny smoke with no divergence.
model_b_ready: vendored runtime + parity harness + safety filters + adapter all in place; only the bit-exact CABT conversion remains.
